Title: Summerfest, The World's Largest Music Festival

URL Source: https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/

Markdown Content:
# Press Releases | Summerfest, The World's Largest Music Festival

[![Image 6: 2026 Summerfest Logo](https://s3.summerfest.com/assets/images/sf-logo/sf25-website-logolockup-731.64x164.38-071525.svg)](https://www.summerfest.com/bannerclick/166)Toggle navigation

Subscribe

# Press Releases

## [100-Day Countdown to the Fourth of July: America250 Reveals First Five Host Cities for July 3-4 Block Parties including Summerfest and Launches National Give-Back Effort](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/03/26/100-day-countdown-to-the-fourth-of-july-america250-reveals-first-five-host-cities-for-july-3-4-block-parties-and-launches-national-give-back-effort/)

Posted on Mar 26, 2026

WASHINGTON, D.C. – March 26, 2026 – America250, the national nonpartisan organization charged by Congress with leading the celebration and commemoration of the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence, today launched the official 100-day countdown to the Fourth of July with a wave of national announcements previewing how Americans can celebrate the week of July 4.

* * *

## [Shake James, Summerfest and Visit Milwaukee Unveil Tech-Integrated 2026 Adidas Capsule at SXSW](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/03/18/shake-james-summerfest-and-visit-milwaukee-unveil-tech-integrated-2026-adidas-capsule-at-sxsw/)

Posted on Mar 18, 2026

MILWAUKEE (March 18, 2026) – Flavor isn’t something you add. It’s something you are.

* * *

## [SUMMERFEST PRESENTS THE PUSSYCAT DOLLS RETURN SUNDAY, JUNE 21 AT AMERICAN FAMILY INSURANCE AMPHITHEATER](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/03/12/summerfest-presents-the-pussycat-dolls-return-sunday,-june-21-at-american-family-insurance-amphitheater/)

Posted on Mar 12, 2026

After months of speculation, multi-platinum pop supergroup The Pussycat Dolls officially return to the global stage with the announcement of their highly anticipated 2026 North America, Europe and U.K. Tour – PCD FOREVER

* * *

## [Fireworks and Full-Throttle Fun](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/02/24/fireworks-and-full-throttle-fun/)

Posted on Feb 24, 2026

MILWAUKEE, WI (February 24, 2026) — Milwaukee World Festival, Inc. (MWF) producer of Summerfest presented by American Family Insurance, and Harley‑Davidson (H-D) today announced the reignition of an iconic partnership that first brought these two flagship Milwaukee brands together 35 years ago.

* * *

## [Milwaukee’s Summerfest Reveals 2026 Lineup](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/02/19/milwaukee%E2%80%99s-summerfest-reveals-2026-lineup/)

Posted on Feb 19, 2026

MILWAUKEE, WI (February 19, 2026)– Summerfest presented by American Family Insurance announced the 2026 lineup for the three-weekend festival held in Milwaukee, WI, June 18-20, June 25-27, and July 2-4. As an independent music festival, Summerfest celebrating its 58th anniversary, is well known for its multi-genre lineup and is recognized as one of the most affordable music festivals in the world.

* * *

## [Buju Banton and Stephen Marley at BMO Pavilion on Friday, July 3 during Summerfest](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/02/09/buju-banton-and-stephen-marley-at-bmo-pavilion-on-friday-july-3-during-summerfest/)

Posted on Feb 09, 2026

MILWAUKEE, WI (February 9, 2026) – Summerfest presented by American Family Insurance is excited to announce Buju Banton and Stephen Marley as the headliners for the BMO Pavilion with Miller Lite on Friday, July 3, 2026.

* * *

## [Charlie Wilson at BMO Pavilion on Thursday, June 18 during Summerfest](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/02/09/charlie-wilson-at-bmo-pavilion-on-thursday-june-18-during-summerfest/)

Posted on Feb 09, 2026

MILWAUKEE, WI (February 9, 2026) – Summerfest presented by American Family Insurance is excited to announce Charlie Wilson as the festival’s opening day headliner at the BMO Pavilion with Miller Lite on Thursday, June 18, 2026.

* * *

## [CARÍN LEÓN ANNOUNCES THE NORTH AMERICAN TOUR 2026](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/02/05/car%C3%ADn-le%C3%B3n-announces-the-north-american-tour-2026/)

Posted on Feb 05, 2026

Milwaukee, WI — February 5, 2026 — Mexican superstar Carín León will bring the Sonoran desert to the world with the Tour Norteamérica 2026, taking his music to dozens of cities across the United States and Canada, including Milwaukee, WI on Saturday, June 20 at the American Family Insurance Amphitheater during Summerfest.

* * *

## [2026 Let The Music Play Grants Awarded Supporting Music Education in Milwaukee County](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/02/03/2026-let-the-music-play-grants-awarded-supporting-music-education-in-milwaukee-county/)

Posted on Feb 03, 2026

MILWAUKEE, WI (February 3, 2026) – Summerfest and American Family Insurance announced the recipients of the 2026 Let The Music Play grant program.

* * *

## [Ella Mai at BMO Pavilion on Thursday, July 2 during Summerfest](https://www.summerfest.com/press-releases/2026/02/02/ella-mai-at-bmo-pavilion-on-thursday-july-2-during-summerfest/)

Posted on Feb 02, 2026

MILWAUKEE, WI (February 2, 2026) – Summerfest presented by American Family Insurance is excited to announce R&B singer/songwriter Ella Mai as the headliner for the BMO Pavilion with Miller Lite on Thursday, July 2, 2026.

* * *
